question: For partially paid invoices, list the invoice id and the outstanding balance.

question: For fully paid invoices, list the invoice id and the insurance coverage percent.

question: Per insurance provider, what is the total outstanding balance?
reference_sql: SELECT p.insurance_provider, SUM(i.total_amount - i.insurance_paid) FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.insurance_provider

question: Compute the total outstanding balance for each insurance provider.

question: Show every insurance provider with its total outstanding balance.
reference_sql: SELECT p.insurance_provider, SUM(i.total_amount - i.insurance_paid) FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.insurance_provider

question: Per product category, what is the net revenue after discounts?
reference_sql: SELECT pr.category, SUM(oi.quantity * pr.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount_percent / 100.0)) FROM order_items oi JOIN products pr ON oi.product_id = pr.product_id GROUP BY pr.category

question: Per insurance provider, what percentage is insurance paid out of total billed?
reference_sql: SELECT p.insurance_provider, SUM(i.insurance_paid) * 100.0 / SUM(i.total_amount) AS pct FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.insurance_provider

question: Per specialty, what percentage is completed appointments out of all appointments?
reference_sql: SELECT d.specialty, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id GROUP BY d.specialty

question: Compute completed appointments as a percent of all appointments for each specialty.

question: Per product category, what percentage is discounted units out of all units?

question: For 2016, what did each team pay per win? Show team and cost per win.
reference_sql: WITH pay AS (SELECT teamID, SUM(salary) AS payroll FROM Salaries WHERE yearID = 2016 GROUP BY teamID) SELECT t.name, p.payroll * 1.0 / t.W AS cost_per_win FROM Teams t JOIN pay p ON t.teamID = p.teamID WHERE t.yearID = 2016 AND t.W > 0

question: Compute 2016 payroll divided by wins for every team.
reference_sql: WITH pay AS (SELECT teamID, SUM(salary) AS payroll FROM Salaries WHERE yearID = 2016 GROUP BY teamID) SELECT t.name, p.payroll * 1.0 / t.W AS cost_per_win FROM Teams t JOIN pay p ON t.teamID = p.teamID WHERE t.yearID = 2016 AND t.W > 0

question: Show each 2016 team's salary cost per victory.
reference_sql: WITH pay AS (SELECT teamID, SUM(salary) AS payroll FROM Salaries WHERE yearID = 2016 GROUP BY teamID) SELECT t.name, p.payroll * 1.0 / t.W AS cost_per_win FROM Teams t JOIN pay p ON t.teamID = p.teamID WHERE t.yearID = 2016 AND t.W > 0

question: Which 2016 teams paid how much per win? List name and ratio.
reference_sql: WITH pay AS (SELECT teamID, SUM(salary) AS payroll FROM Salaries WHERE yearID = 2016 GROUP BY teamID) SELECT t.name, p.payroll * 1.0 / t.W AS cost_per_win FROM Teams t JOIN pay p ON t.teamID = p.teamID WHERE t.yearID = 2016 AND t.W > 0

question: For 2010, what did each team pay per win? Show team and cost per win.
reference_sql: WITH pay AS (SELECT teamID, SUM(salary) AS payroll FROM Salaries WHERE yearID = 2010 GROUP BY teamID) SELECT t.name, p.payroll * 1.0 / t.W AS cost_per_win FROM Teams t JOIN pay p ON t.teamID = p.teamID WHERE t.yearID = 2010 AND t.W > 0

question: Per product line, compute the average unit margin.
reference_sql: SELECT p.ProductLine, AVG(p.ListPrice - p.StandardCost) FROM Product p WHERE p.ListPrice > 0 AND p.ProductLine IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.ProductLine

question: Per territory, compute the total tax plus freight.

question: Per year, compute the subtotal minus freight.

question: Per vendor, compute the average PO line value per order.
reference_sql: SELECT v.Name, SUM(d.LineTotal) / COUNT(DISTINCT h.PurchaseOrderID) FROM PurchaseOrderDetail d JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader h ON d.PurchaseOrderID = h.PurchaseOrderID JOIN Vendor v ON h.VendorID = v.BusinessEntityID GROUP BY v.Name

question: Show each vendor's average PO line value per order.
reference_sql: SELECT v.Name, SUM(d.LineTotal) / COUNT(DISTINCT h.PurchaseOrderID) FROM PurchaseOrderDetail d JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader h ON d.PurchaseOrderID = h.PurchaseOrderID JOIN Vendor v ON h.VendorID = v.BusinessEntityID GROUP BY v.Name

question: For every vendor, report the average PO line value per order.

question: Group by vendor and calculate the average PO line value per order.
reference_sql: SELECT v.Name, SUM(d.LineTotal) / COUNT(DISTINCT h.PurchaseOrderID) FROM PurchaseOrderDetail d JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader h ON d.PurchaseOrderID = h.PurchaseOrderID JOIN Vendor v ON h.VendorID = v.BusinessEntityID GROUP BY v.Name

question: Per ship method, compute the average freight percentage.
reference_sql: SELECT sm.Name, AVG(h.Freight * 100.0 / h.SubTotal) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN ShipMethod sm ON h.ShipMethodID = sm.ShipMethodID WHERE h.SubTotal > 0 GROUP BY sm.Name

question: Show each ship method's average freight percentage.
reference_sql: SELECT sm.Name, AVG(h.Freight * 100.0 / h.SubTotal) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN ShipMethod sm ON h.ShipMethodID = sm.ShipMethodID WHERE h.SubTotal > 0 GROUP BY sm.Name

question: For every ship method, report the average freight percentage.
reference_sql: SELECT sm.Name, AVG(h.Freight * 100.0 / h.SubTotal) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN ShipMethod sm ON h.ShipMethodID = sm.ShipMethodID WHERE h.SubTotal > 0 GROUP BY sm.Name

question: Group by ship method and calculate the average freight percentage.
reference_sql: SELECT sm.Name, AVG(h.Freight * 100.0 / h.SubTotal) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN ShipMethod sm ON h.ShipMethodID = sm.ShipMethodID WHERE h.SubTotal > 0 GROUP BY sm.Name

question: Per territory, what percent is online orders of all orders?
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, SUM(CASE WHEN h.OnlineOrderFlag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

question: Compute online orders as a share of all orders for each territory.
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, SUM(CASE WHEN h.OnlineOrderFlag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

question: Show each territory's online orders-to-all orders percentage.
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, SUM(CASE WHEN h.OnlineOrderFlag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

question: Report online orders over all orders (as %) per territory.
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, SUM(CASE WHEN h.OnlineOrderFlag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

reference_sql: SELECT w.ProductID, SUM(w.ScrappedQty) * 100.0 / SUM(w.OrderQty) AS pct FROM WorkOrder w GROUP BY w.ProductID

question: Per product line, what percent is manufactured products of all products?
